guard_summary.scope: Prepared next safe entity identity cleanup batch after identity210-211.
commands_used: jq read-only inspection of data/canonical/entities.jsonl, data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and batches210-211
filters: Excluded direct aliases already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
Excluded direct DNM pairs already present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
Excluded direct candidates and DNM pairs already proposed in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch210-prep.json and data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch211-prep.json.
Preferred exact same person/org/unit/program labels with compatible payload entity_type and source-backed evidence refs.
Used do_not_merge only for clear generic-role or contaminated-alias false positives.
Avoided broad community-board/CAC traps except in skipped notes.
guard_summary.notes: The worktree was already dirty, including source-of-truth and generated files. This prep did not revert, overwrite, materialize, validate, export, or mutate those files.
